svg.text: Same-day expiry means gamma is huge. One trade can blow a month of premium. Sizing is everything.

g.text: 1 · Max risk = 1.5% of account per trade
$50K account → max $750 per IC · max $375 per straddle. Sizing is the lever, NOT win rate.
If you cannot survive 5 max losers in a row, you are over-sized. Period.
2 · Stop at 3× credit (for IC) or -50% (for debit)
No "let it work" past 3× credit. By 3× the structure is gamma-trapped against you.
For debit trades (long calls/puts), stop at -50% of premium paid. Decay accelerates.
3 · One position per session · max two strategies
Overlapping positions correlate during stress · 1 IC + 1 directional max
Multiple ICs at different strikes look diversified — they aren't. They all crash together.
4 · NEVER trade FOMC, CPI, NFP days unsized
Half-size on event days · zero size on FOMC press conference 14:30 ET
Vol can move 5+ points in 2 minutes — gamma exposure becomes lottery
5 · 3 max losses = stop trading for the week
3 consecutive losses = thesis broken or regime changed · don't fight it
Walk away · review on weekend · come back Monday with fresh model
